testcase.name: test_holidays_2026_wa_public

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'Labor Day' == 'Labour Day'
- Labour Day ? - + Labor Day

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:290: in test_holidays_2026_wa_public assert by_date["2026-03-02"]["name"] == "Labour Day" E AssertionError: assert 'Labor Day' == 'Labour Day' E E - Labour Day E ? - E + Labor Day

testcase.name: test_year_has_core_holidays[2028]
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_holidays_and_leaves.py:86: in test_year_has_core_holidays assert any(exp in n for n in names), f"{year}: missing holiday matching '{exp}'. Got: {names}" E AssertionError: 2028: missing holiday matching 'Labour Day'. Got: {"New Year's Day (observed)", 'Easter Sunday', "New Year's Day", 'Boxing Day', 'Christmas Day', "King's Birthday", 'Labor Day', 'Australia Day', 'Easter Monday', 'ANZAC Day', 'Good Friday', 'Western Australia Day'} E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object TestDynamicHolidays.test_year_has_core_holidays.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xf865fb1d99a0>)

testcase.name: test_year_has_core_holidays[2029]
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_holidays_and_leaves.py:86: in test_year_has_core_holidays assert any(exp in n for n in names), f"{year}: missing holiday matching '{exp}'. Got: {names}" E AssertionError: 2029: missing holiday matching 'Labour Day'. Got: {'Easter Sunday', "New Year's Day", 'Boxing Day', 'Christmas Day', "King's Birthday", 'Labor Day', 'Australia Day', 'Easter Monday', 'ANZAC Day', 'Good Friday', 'Western Australia Day'} E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object TestDynamicHolidays.test_year_has_core_holidays.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xf865fb1da0a0>)

testcase.name: test_year_has_core_holidays[2030]
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_holidays_and_leaves.py:86: in test_year_has_core_holidays assert any(exp in n for n in names), f"{year}: missing holiday matching '{exp}'. Got: {names}" E AssertionError: 2030: missing holiday matching 'Labour Day'. Got: {'Easter Sunday', "New Year's Day", 'Boxing Day', 'Christmas Day', "King's Birthday", 'Labor Day', 'Australia Day', 'Easter Monday', 'ANZAC Day', 'Good Friday', 'Western Australia Day'} E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object TestDynamicHolidays.test_year_has_core_holidays.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xf865fb1da260>)
